prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为约10038→19244→13989→14586→17619名，整体呈波动后移趋势；2025年基准位次约17619名，较2024年大幅后移约3033名，反映竞争加剧；该校在湖南省物理类招生计划2021–2024年均为18人，2025年增至21人，2026年维持21人，与2025年持平，无扩招缓解竞争。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第60名，近年排名稳定在55–67区间，为医药类院校中唯一211；近年声誉平稳，无明显负面舆情事件；抖音综合热度排名第78（一般），2023年热度一般，2022年较热，整体关注度中等；该校以临床医学为核心王牌专业，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学专业2024年热度指数70.19（推荐），较2023年小幅降温但仍偏热；湖南省物理类考生2026年约34.7万人，较2025年32万人增长约8.4%，考生规模持续扩大，竞争进一步加剧；属跨省招生，地域偏好对湖南考生影响中性。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次整体后移趋势、2026年物理类考生大幅增加（约+8.4%）而招生计划持平、学校声誉平稳但临床医学热度仍偏热等因素，预计2026年竞争较2025年进一步加剧，位次继续后移。预测最低位次约17819名，区间17319–18319名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 10038 → 19244 → 13989 → 14586 → 17619, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 17619, significantly shifting backward by about 3033 compared to 2024, reflecting intensified competition; the enrollment plan for this university in Hunan Province for Physics Category was 18 students from 2021 to 2024, increased to 21 in 2025, and maintained at 21 in 2026, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion to alleviate competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 60th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with stable rankings in the 55–67 range in recent years, being the only 211 among medical institutions; reputation has been stable in recent years, with no significant negative public opinion incidents; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking 78th (average), with average popularity in 2023 and relatively high in 2022, overall moderate attention; the university's core flagship major is clinical medicine, which strongly attracts high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity index for clinical medicine in 2024 was 70.19 (recommended), slightly cooling compared to 2023 but still relatively hot; the number of Physics Category candidates in Hunan Province in 2026 is about 347,000, an increase of about 8.4% from 320,000 in 2025, with the candidate pool continuing to expand, further intensifying competition; it is an inter-provincial enrollment, with regional preference having a neutral impact on Hunan candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the overall backward trend of historical rankings, the significant increase in Physics Category candidates in 2026 (about +8.4%) with a flat enrollment plan, stable school reputation but still relatively hot clinical medicine popularity, it is expected that competition in 2026 will further intensify compared to 2025, with rankings continuing to shift backward. The predicted minimum ranking is about 17819, with a range of 17319–18319.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 17319–18319, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main application direction (Clinical Medicine, Anesthesiology, Medical Imaging, etc.), with Tier 1 majors (Clinical Medicine 5+3 Integrated Program, Stomatology) as sprint targets, and Tier 3 majors (Preventive Medicine, Pharmacy Category, Medical Technology Category) as safe backups. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<17319), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship long-term program majors.
